heading: Delete One Document
body:
To delete a document from a collection through the Atlas UI:<Tab tabid="list-view">
  List View

  To delete a document, hover over the document and click the
   icon.

  ![Delete button in List view](/_includes/images/atlas-ui/compass/delete-doc.png)

  After you click the delete button, the document is flagged for deletion.
  Atlas asks for confirmation that you want to remove the
  document.
</Tab>JSON ViewTo delete a document, hover over the document and click the
 icon.![Delete button in JSON view](/_includes/images/atlas-ui/compass/delete-doc-json.png)After you click the delete button, the document is flagged for deletion.
Atlas asks for confirmation that you want to remove the
document.Table ViewTo delete a document, hover over the document and click the
 icon.![Delete button Table view](/_includes/images/atlas-ui/compass/table-view-delete.png)After you click the delete button, the document is flagged for deletion.
Atlas asks for confirmation that you want to remove the
document.Once you confirm, Atlas deletes the document from the collection.
